mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_conversation_message (conversation_id, role, content, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{status}, #{requestId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, role, content, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_conversation_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY id ASC
